Name: Box_Duration
Description: The box duration of the effect in days.

Name: Decay_Time_Constant
Description: The exponential decay length, in days, where the current effect is equal to **Initial_Effect** - dt/**Decay_Time_Constant** (dt equal to delta time).

Name: Initial_Effect
Description: The initial efficacy, held for a duration as specified with the **Box_Duration** parameter and then decaying at an exponential length (in days), where the current effect is equal to **Initial_Effect** - dt/**Decay_Time_Constant** (dt equal to delta time).
